title: Clinical Terminologist
description: Own and maintain SNOMED CT and LOINC value sets for our clinical data platform. Build concept maps across code systems.

title: FHIR Integration Engineer
description: Design and build HL7 FHIR interfaces for clinical data exchange between EHRs and our platform.

title: Director of Clinical Informatics
description: Lead our clinical informatics strategy and a team building decision support.

title: eCQM Measure Developer
description: Develop and validate electronic clinical quality measures. HEDIS experience a plus.

title: Clinical Data Steward
description: Own master data and data governance for clinical vocabularies and reference data.

title: Senior Account Executive
description: Sell our SaaS platform to mid-market health systems. Quota-carrying role.
